name: zoom-zra
description: Read Zoom Revenue Accelerator data through MCP and use Codex to review conversations, transcripts, customers, deals, indicators, pipeline risk, team scope, coaching notes, and follow-up drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Review ZRA data and draft sales workflow outputs in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Zoom ZRA connects Codex to Zoom Revenue Accelerator through a Zoom app connector and the ZRA MCP server. It uses the current ZRA MCP tools to review conversations and transcripts, assess deal health, build customer context, review indicators, resolve team/user scope, triage pipeline risk, prepare coaching notes, and draft post-call follow-up artifacts in Codex. It does not send emails, update CRM records, schedule meetings, or write back to ZRA.
defaultPrompt: Review my latest sales call in ZRA.
How is my Acme deal looking in ZRA?
Build a customer brief for Acme from ZRA.
Find where pricing was discussed in my last ZRA call.
Show my at-risk deals closing this month.
Review pricing-objection indicators in my recent ZRA calls.
Prep my 1:1 coaching agenda from recent ZRA calls.
Draft a follow-up package from my last ZRA conversation.
